commands: docker run -d --name agones-palworld-e2e -p 8211:8211/udp -p 8212:8212/tcp -p 25575:25575/tcp -e PUID=1000 -e PGID=1000 -e PORT=8211 -e PLAYERS=4 -e SERVER_NAME=e2e -e ADMIN_PASSWORD=e2e-admin -e RCON_ENABLED=true -e REST_API_ENABLED=true -e REST_API_PORT=8212 -e MULTITHREADING=true kbve/agones-palworld:latest

echo 'Waiting for Palworld REST (<=900s)...' && for i in $(seq 1 900); do if curl -fsS -u admin:e2e-admin http://127.0.0.1:8212/v1/api/info >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Palworld ready after ${i}s"; break; fi; if [ -z "$(docker ps -q -f name=agones-palworld-e2e -f status=running)" ]; then echo "Container exited early at ${i}s — dumping logs:"; docker logs agones-palworld-e2e 2>&1 | tail -160; docker rm -f agones-palworld-e2e 2>/dev/null || true; exit 1; fi; if [ $(( i % 15 )) -eq 0 ]; then echo "--- [${i}s] still waiting; container tail: ---"; docker logs --tail 5 agones-palworld-e2e 2>&1 | sed 's/^/  | /'; fi; if [ $i -eq 900 ]; then echo 'Palworld did not start in 900s — dumping logs:'; docker logs agones-palworld-e2e 2>&1 | tail -160; docker rm -f agones-palworld-e2e 2>/dev/null || true; exit 1; fi; sleep 1; done

echo '=== BINARY SYMBOL PROBE ===' && docker exec -u root agones-palworld-e2e bash -lc 'set +e; export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update -qq >/dev/null 2>&1; apt-get install -y -qq binutils >/dev/null 2>&1; BIN=/palworld/Pal/Binaries/Linux/PalServer-Linux-Shipping; readelf --dyn-syms -W "$BIN" 2>/dev/null > /tmp/dyn.txt; echo "[dynsym lines] $(wc -l </tmp/dyn.txt)"; echo "[defined FUNC] $(grep -cE " FUNC .* [0-9]+ _?Z?" /tmp/dyn.txt)"; for s in GUObjectArray FUObjectArray GObjectArray ProcessEvent ProcessInternal ProcessLocalScriptFunction StaticConstructObjectInternal StaticConstructObject_Internal GMalloc GNatives CallFunctionByNameWithArguments AllocateUObject; do t=$(grep -c "$s" /tmp/dyn.txt); d=$(grep "$s" /tmp/dyn.txt | grep -cvE " UND "); echo "### $s total=$t defined=$d"; grep "$s" /tmp/dyn.txt | grep -vE " UND " | head -3; done; echo "### FName ToString"; grep -E "_ZNK?5FName" /tmp/dyn.txt | grep -vE " UND " | grep -iE "tostring|append" | head -6; echo "### key vtables"; grep -E "_ZTV(7UObject|6UClass|11UGameEngine|8UWorld)[^a-zA-Z]" /tmp/dyn.txt | grep -vE " UND " | head -8; echo "### GNatives/GMalloc data globals"; grep -E " OBJECT .* (GMalloc|GNatives|GUObjectArray)" /tmp/dyn.txt | head -6' 2>&1 | sed 's/^/  | /'
echo 'diagnostic probe complete — tests skipped'; docker rm -f agones-palworld-e2e 2>/dev/null || true; exit 0
